# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.8. SAFETY REGULATIONS [34500 - 34520.5]
##### § 34500.5

For purposes of this division, the term “commercial motor vehicle” has the same meaning as defined in subdivision (b) of Section 15210, or any vehicle listed in Section 34500.

*(Amended by Stats. 2015, Ch. 451, Sec. 58. (SB 491) Effective January 1, 2016.)*
